prestazioni: 2ZZ-GE (1.8L I4) engine swap to a fully built 2ZZ-GE with forged internals (JE 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings) and a TODA Racing Stage 3A camshaft kit (272° duration, 12.0mm lift) paired with a Tomei 4-2-1 header and HKS Hi-Power exhaust with 60mm titanium tips for optimized scavenging

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing, 60 trim compressor) with a custom PTE 46mm wastegate and GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 11-row core) running 18 psi on E85 via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor and ID1000x injectors for 350whp target

Full chassis reinforcement with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow steel), Cusco rear subframe brace, and TRD 4-point roll cage (bolt-in, mild steel) paired with BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs) and Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar for neutral handling
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit (Pandem widebody conversion) with custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for Matrix XRS chassis) and rear diffuser, paired with OEM-style side skirts (TRD replica) and a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with red pinstriping

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x8.5 +35 offset) with Toyo R888R tires (225/45/17) and Project Kics R40 lug nuts, paired with DBA 4000 Series rotors and Hawk HT-10 brake pads for aggressive track-ready stance

Custom interior with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (350mm, suede), and Defi BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, wideband) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod
